summary: The session focused on the North American Telugu Society (NATS) and its upcoming 7th annual convention scheduled for May 26-28 at the Raritan Convention Center. The user discussed fundraising strategies, including a counter for tracking donations, and drafted invitations for dignitaries to attend and speak at the event.
facts: The North American Telugu Society (NATS) is a non-profit organization formed in 2009 by 200 volunteers to serve Telugu communities across North America. NATS conducts a bi-annual convention attended by approximately 8000 people to celebrate Telugu culture. The 7th annual convention is scheduled for May 26-28 at the Raritan Convention Center. The convention will include cultural, literary, business symposiums, shark tanks, continuing education classes, women's forums, and career development events. NATS has a 24/7 helpline service at 1-888-483-5848 for immediate assistance. The user is inviting dignitaries to address an audience of 8000 attendees and to receive a Lifetime Achievement Award. The target audience for the convention includes Telugu-speaking professionals with disposable incomes ranging from $100K to $250K+. The user is developing a fundraising counter to track donations for the event.
